basic_details.job_title: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology (ISM), Dhanbad (IIT (ISM) Dhanbad) has published the Junior Research Fellow Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 01 Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position. Candidates up to 35 years of age holding an M.Tech/ B.Tech in Electronics or Electrical Engineering, or an M.Sc. in Physical, Chemical, or Material Science along with GATE/ UGC-NET qualification are eligible to apply online at iitism.ac.in. The application process will remain open until 05 August 2026, and candidates can easily access the official notification PDF and online application link be

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Relaxation to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech/ B.Tech in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or M.Sc in Physical/ Chemical/ Material Science, GATE/ UGC-NET qualified
qualification.details: M.Tech/ B.Tech in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering or M.Sc in Physical/ Chemical/ Material Science with GATE/ UGC-NET qualification.

salary_details.details: Rs. 37,000/- per month for two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_ism_dhanb: M.Tech/ B.Tech in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or M.Sc in Physical/ Chemical/ Material Science, GATE/ UGC-NET qualified

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Tech/ B.Tech in Electronics/ Electrical Engineering or M.Sc in Physical/ Chemical/ Material Science with GATE/ UGC-NET qualification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Relaxation to SC/ST/OBC candidates as per Government of India norms.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 37,000/- per month for two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT(ISM) Dhanbad to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application is 05 August 2026. It is advisable to complete the application process well before this deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must have completed M.Tech/B.Tech in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or M.Sc in Physical/Chemical/Material Science and must be GATE/UGC-NET qualified to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position is 35 years. Age relaxation is applicable for SC/ST/OBC candidates as per government norms.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a stipend of Rs. 37,000/- per month for the first two years and Rs. 42,000/- per month for the third year.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position in the recruitment drive conducted by IIT(ISM) Dhanbad.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for IIT(ISM) Dhanbad Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is no application fee required for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment, as stated in the official notification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position will be based on an interview. Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT(ISM) Dhanbad is a contractual job. The contract is for a specified period, typically three years.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly before applying.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology (ISM), Dhanbad, in the state of Jharkhand.
